title: plectranthus mollis
intro: Plectranthus mollis, also known as the velvet leaf, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family. It is a flowering plant native to southern Africa, characterized by its soft, velvety leaves and purple flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat conditions such as asthma, bronchitis, and digestive issues. Plectranthus mollis is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, where it can be consumed to benefit from its calming effects and to reduce inflammation, promoting overall health and well-being.
